name: M4A4 | 皇家圣骑士
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. It has been painstakingly etched and painted to give a sense of grandeur. This phonecall never happened, do you understand? - The Paladin and the Father Part 1
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把武器通过精心雕刻与涂装来产生庄严感。 这通电话从来就没有过，明白了吗？-《圣骑士与父辈（上）》
